text: I enjoy being chased and captured.
Serving someone brings me joy, even without sexual reward.
I get turned on by controlling someone’s thoughts or decisions.
I enjoy watching others engage in kink without participating.
I enjoy scenarios that make me feel afraid, safely.
Being used as furniture or decor arouses me.
I enjoy changing roles depending on who I’m with.
I need emotional intimacy to enjoy kink play.
I express kink with more than one partner.
I love the thrill of stalking and chasing my partner.
Pain helps me process emotions or feel release.
Becoming a different character excites me during kink.
Clear rules and structure make kink more fulfilling.
I feel most fulfilled when taking care of my partner.
I enjoy kink activities even when I’m alone.
Soft textures and gentle sensations turn me on more than pain.
Being insulted or demeaned turns me on.
I enjoy playing with someone’s emotions, consensually.
I explore different power dynamics beyond gendered expectations.
My kink dynamics extend beyond scenes into daily life.
